vllm.title: Support beam search & parallel generation
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for beam search and parallel generation (i.e., n > 1).
NOTE: The correctness is only checked for beam search, but not for random sampling methods.
Tested models:

OPT-125M
OPT-350M
OPT-1.3B
OPT-2.7B
OPT-6.7B
OPT-13B

Tested GPUs:

A100
